userOrigin:
Autonomous mission goal: Validate all local and cloud models and clean up the available list, filtering for free models.
Recovery directive: Mission is running on a cloud controller for a local-runtime goal. Keep the controller, but work in narrow shell-first substeps, reuse existing local runtimes before creating duplicates, prefer API/batch verification, and avoid blocked file-write paths.
Workspace root for file tools: /home/corp-unum/openunum. file_read/file_write/file_patch only work inside this root. Use shell_run for /tmp or other external paths.
Local-runtime guidance:
- Inspect existing local runtimes and imported models before creating anything new.
- If `ollama list` already shows a matching local model, prefer verifying it with one short prompt instead of importing another duplicate.
- Prefer decisive proof over low-value internals: once you have a plausible runtime target, verify it directly instead of inspecting blob paths or metadata.
- Prefer non-interactive verification surfaces when available: HTTP/JSON API or one-shot batch command first, interactive REPL/TTY path last.
Mission completion contract: local-runtime-proof-v1. DONE is valid only when checkpoint + proof requirements are satisfied.
Execution contract:
- Do exactly one verified substep per turn.
- Prefer shell-first local inspection for local-machine tasks.
- If uncertain, inspect current state before choosing a tool.
- If a route fails twice, pivot to a different route without asking for help.
- Do not dump large logs into your answer; summarize proof from tool results.
At the end of this turn append exactly:
CHECKPOINT: <one concise line>
MISSION_STATUS: DONE
or
CHECKPOINT: <one concise line>
MISSION_STATUS: CONTINUE
planAgreed: Execute: validate → Execute: list → Execute: write → Execute: verify
